scripts.build: echo 'Building native binary for nodejs' && cd native && npm run build:dev && echo 'Copying binary to ug-out' && mkdir -p ug-out && cp node/cli.cjs ug-out/ && cp node/mcp-server.mjs ug-out/
scripts.graph: echo 'Building Graph data' && node node/cli.cjs graph
scripts.ingest: echo 'Ingesting graph data into DB' && node node/cli.cjs db-ingest
scripts.rag: echo 'Performing RAG search on DB' && node node/cli.cjs db-rag
scripts.traverse: echo 'Traversing the graph' && node node/cli.cjs db-traverse
